case_title: JASON MILLER VS. LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MILLER, JASON AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-08-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $35.00) SERVED FEB-08-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-08-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MILLER, JASON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,610.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC HEARING SET FOR APR-27-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF MILLER, JASON
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "APPROVED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC SET FOR APR-27-2011 IS CONTINUED TO JUN-03-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN 506, PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARD PLACE DE, LLC
THE MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-03-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT SATISFIED.
